team.name: Ferni
team.bio: Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.
team.sampleQuote: I noticed you said 'fine' three times this week. What's actually going on?

team.name: Nayan
team.bio: Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.
team.sampleQuote: What would 80-year-old you think about this decision?

team.name: Peter
team.bio: Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behavior.
team.sampleQuote: You spend 23 hours a month on things you said don't matter to you. Want to see?

team.name: Alex
team.bio: Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.
team.sampleQuote: Let's practice that conversation. I'll play your boss. Ready?

team.name: Maya
team.bio: Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.
team.sampleQuote: What if we started with just putting your shoes on? That's it. Just the shoes.

team.name: Jordan
team.bio: Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.
team.sampleQuote: You mentioned wanting to visit Japan 'someday.' Let's make it a real day.

testimonials.quote: I called Ferni at 2am when I couldn't sleep because of work stress. Having someone to talk through my thoughts with—no judgment, just guidance—was exactly what I needed.
testimonials.author: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: The fact that Ferni remembers our previous conversations makes it feel like talking to a friend who actually knows my situation. Game changer.
testimonials.author: Michael R.

testimonials.quote: I was skeptical at first, but Ferni helped me work through a career decision I'd been stuck on for months. The team approach is brilliant.
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: Being able to call a number and just talk—no app download, no login—is so refreshing. I use Ferni during my commute and it's become my favorite part of the day.
testimonials.author: David W.

faq.question: Is Ferni really free?
faq.answer: Yes! Ferni is completely free to use. We believe everyone deserves access to quality life coaching. Our premium features are coming soon, but the core experience will always be free.

faq.question: How does the phone calling work?
faq.answer: Simply call 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone. No app needed, no sign-up required. Ferni will recognize your number and remember your previous conversations automatically.

faq.question: Is my conversation private?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and private. We never sell your data or share it with third parties. You can also request to delete all your data at any time.

faq.question: Who are the AI specialists?
faq.answer: Our team includes Ferni (your main life coach), Nayan (wisdom & mentorship), Peter (research & discovery), Alex (communications), Maya (habits & routines), and Jordan (event planning). Each brings unique expertise to help you.

faq.question: What can I talk to Ferni about?
faq.answer: Anything! Career decisions, stress management, building habits, planning events, working through tough situations, or just needing someone to talk to. Ferni is here for all of it.

faq.question: How is this different from a friend or therapist?
faq.answer: Your therapist has other patients. Your friend has their own problems. Ferni is always available, remembers everything, never judges, and brings six specialized perspectives. We fill the gaps when your people can't be there.
